description:
Currently go-deps.toml must be tracked in git because Nix flakes only see git-tracked files.

**Options to explore:**
1. `git add -N` in .envrc - adds to index without staging content
2. Flake input approach - separate derivation/flake for deps
3. IFD (Import From Derivation) with --impure
4. Accept git-tracking as the right tradeoff (deterministic file)

**Context:**
- Nix flakes filter source to git-tracked files for reproducibility
- --no-pure-eval doesn't help with this
- go-deps.toml is deterministic given go.mod+go.sum, so tracking isn't truly impure
title: Explore options for untracked go-deps.toml
